items.title: Did Jaylen Brown Just Disrespect Jayson Tatum?
items.body_excerpt: Perk addresses the Jaylen Brown situation head-on, why he voted Brown first-team All-NBA, and why former players texted him questioning the timing of Brown calling this his favorite season. Channing and RJ weigh in on why it landed wrong. 🏀 Download the Fanatics Sportsbook app!…
